metadata.name: Andon Cord Pull by Assembly Worker

description: An assembly line worker pulls the Andon cord to stop the line because they've noticed a misaligned part on a vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the Andon alert from the specific workstation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the alert from workstation 'D-37'.

nodes.task_description: Immediately dispatch the workstation's team lead to investigate the issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent notifies the team lead to go to the workstation.

nodes.task_description: Once the issue is resolved (e.g., part realigned), authorize the line to be restarted.

expected_outcome.expected: The team lead confirms the fix, and the agent restarts the line in the system.
